expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add backend logic to invite members",
      "description": "As a system, I need backend support to invite new members by email.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint accepts email for invitation",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add member invitation UI",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to invite members by email from the workspace UI.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invitation form is visible",
        "Form submission triggers the backend invitation",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend logic to change member roles",
      "description": "As a system, I need backend support to update member roles.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint allows updating role to viewer, editor, or admin",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add role change UI",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to change a member's role from the UI.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Role selection control is available for each member",
        "Changing role updates the backend",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add backend logic to revoke access",
      "description": "As a system, I need backend support to revoke a member's workspace access.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend endpoint allows removing member access",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add revoke access UI",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to revoke member access from the UI.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke access button/action is visible for members",
        "Action requires confirmation and triggers the backend",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Record membership changes in audit log",
      "description": "As a system, I want to log all membership changes so that there is a history.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Schema/backend logs invite, role change, and revoke actions",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-008",
      "title": "Review audit log in settings UI",
      "description": "As an admin, I want to see recent membership changes in the settings page.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Audit log view is visible in workspace settings",
        "Shows recent membership changes",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 8,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
